messages.body: Hey Zoe, we have cancelled the subscription for you. Wishing you all the very best for your business:)
You had requested for a cancellation right?
Yes
I didn\'t know there was a process to that. I thought I could just let you know about cancelling and I\'d stop being billed and delete the app
I wanted to check in and see how I can assist you with the process. Please let me know a convenient time for us to connect.
Hi Sid. Which process ?  Xo Zoe
All good. If we can just cancel that would be best. I have no time this week and then I\'m traveling for work the following week. I currently have no time for an off boarding call
Hey Zoe
No it’s a process because we want to make sure that the transition happens smoothly for you:)
Request Closed

Hi Zoe,  	 We are truly sorry for the dissatisfaction and inconvenience you have experienced. We value your feedback and are committed to making this right quickly. To resolve your concerns and proceed smoothly, please s…
Hi Zoe, I hope you’re doing well. I hope you had a wonderful vacation:)
Wanted to understand if you have sometime next week for a quick chat?
Hi ! I\'ll be away on vacation through next week
No worries! Let me know whenever you’re back. Have a great time:)
Loved “No worries! Let me know whenever you’re back. Have a great time:)”
Hey Zoe
